type: 学术多工况结果对比图（multi-condition comparison figure）
goal: 生成一张燃烧工程论文 results 章节使用的 2x2 多工况温度场对比图，所有 panel 严格统一、白底、定性渲染、不含任何虚构数值

title_caption.caption: Predicted in-furnace temperature field under varying excess-air ratios.
title_caption.position: bottom-center, italic compact sans-serif, smaller font size

grid_layout.rule: 2 × 2 == 4; all panels identical size; consistent vertical and horizontal alignment

panels.rule: ALL panels share contour-field rendering; never mix with bar / line

panel_style.frame: thin border 1px #1F2937 around each panel, identical for all four
panel_style.label_position: (a) (b) (c) (d) at top-left of each panel, bold sans-serif, 11pt
panel_style.condition_label_position: centered above each panel, identical position across all four
panel_style.axis_labels: shared axis labels 'x [m]' and 'z [m]' shown on the leftmost column and bottom row only; identical font size and identical tick density across panels; tick numbers omitted (qualitative rendering)
panel_style.internal_titles: no decorative per-panel titles; rely on (a)(b)(c)(d) + condition label only

shared_legend.rule: single shared colorbar to the right of the 2x2 grid, applied identically to all four panels
shared_legend.colorbar_range_rule: no numerical ticks; the colorbar is labeled 'low' at bottom and 'high' at top with the variable name 'Temperature' on its side; gradient strictly low-saturation

color_logic.rule: perceptually uniform low-saturation engineering colormap from deep blue #1E3A8A through teal #0F766E to muted orange #C2410C; same colormap and same range applied to every panel; ≤ 3 main colors visible at any one time

data_authenticity.rule_when_false: render the panels as QUALITATIVE smooth gradient fields shaped like plausible furnace temperature distributions (a tall hot plume zone in the middle, gradually cooling toward walls); each panel differs subtly so that (a) shows the highest core temperature, (d) the lowest core temperature, but no specific numerical values appear anywhere; no isoline values; no vector arrows

must_keep: all four panels identical size, identical aspect, identical position scheme
shared colormap, shared range, shared colorbar across all panels
white background, no gradient backdrop, no decorative pattern
(a)(b)(c)(d) labels in identical position and identical style across panels
only sans-serif typography, identical font family across all panels
the figure should look like a results-section figure of an Applied Energy / Combustion and Flame article
avoid: different colormap or different color range per panel
decorative panel titles, hero panel that visually dominates the rest
saturated brand colors, neon, vivid gradients
3D effects, drop shadows, glossy fills, lens flare
fabricated numerical tick values, fabricated colorbar ranges, fabricated isoline labels
